caveman.routerNote: - caveman pack active: prefer terse, token-efficient prose when normal clarity still holds
caveman.overlayNote: - caveman pack active: default to terse, token-aware prose when it does not reduce correctness

cavemem.routerNote: - cavemem pack active: keep durable summaries compact and high-signal during long sessions
cavemem.overlayNote: - cavemem pack active: prefer compact durable memory and handoff summaries

rtk.routerNote: - rtk pack active: if RTK policy is present, route shell work through RTK instead of raw shell
rtk.overlayNote: - rtk pack active: when RTK policy exists, prefer RTK-routed shell execution

frontend-craft.routerNote: - frontend-craft pack active: avoid generic AI frontend output; prefer distinctive, production-grade interface craft
frontend-craft.overlayNote: - frontend-craft pack active: for frontend work, avoid generic AI aesthetics and push for stronger craft
